recs.s: TOP PRIORITY & now the ONLY recurring failure mode — both of 06-01's 2 failures are this class (Contribution Check 26784313244, Smoke Claude 26784371743), spanning 6 workflows since 05-26. (1) Make 'Process Safe Outputs' treat an individual failed/invalid item as skipped-with-warning whenever >=1 item in the same batch succeeded, instead of red-failing the entire job — today this nullified a successful create_issue + add_labels (Contribution Check) and several successful smoke outputs (Smoke Claude). (2) Validate target=* at the MCP emit boundary: reject an add_comment / create_pull_request_review_comment whose triggering context cannot resolve to a concrete issue/PR number (e.g. schedule events) so the agent self-corrects in-loop — prompt-only guardrails have failed repeatedly across 6 workflows. These two fixes together would have turned BOTH of today's failures into green-with-warning.

PREVENTIVE (did NOT recur 06-01 — heaviest eff_tok Linter Miner 22.5M, under the 25M cap; severity downgraded high->medium). Keep open: (1) reduce the effective-token footprint of heavy daily-aggregation workflows (Linter Miner, Daily Firewall Logs, Documentation Noob Tester) so they keep a margin under 25M eff_tok — several still run in the 20-22.5M band, close to the cliff; (2) harness: on the 429 'Maximum effective tokens exceeded' signature, FAIL FAST rather than retrying 4x with --continue (continuation cannot recover a hard cap). Ties into open #35661.

PREVENTIVE (did NOT recur 06-01). Keep open: fix the detection harness so it does NOT mask the prompt copy with 'cp ... || true'; verify the threat-detection prompt.txt exists (and is non-empty) before invoking the detection agent, and either fail with a clear actionable error or regenerate it. Shared step => protects every create_pull_request workflow from a silent missing-prompt hard-fail like 05-31's Code Simplifier.

NEW WATCH: PR Code Quality Reviewer turn count varied 3->22 (avg 13.8) across 3 SUCCESS runs on 06-01. Monitor whether the high-turn tail correlates with large PRs and whether it ever approaches a turn/time ceiling. If the spread persists, consider a turn budget proportional to PR size or a clearer stop condition in the prompt. No failures yet — observation only.

PREVENTIVE (did NOT recur 06-01 — Test Quality Sentinel + Design Decision Gate all passed). Optional noise-reduction: at checkout, detect a missing PR head ref and exit with a NEUTRAL/skip conclusion rather than a red failure, so a branch deleted mid-flight does not count as a workflow failure. Low priority — no code defect.

PREVENTIVE (no recurrence since 05-30). Keep open: harden the install-golangci-lint Makefile target (~Makefile:403) — download to a temp file, verify HTTP 200 + gzip magic bytes before extracting, retry with backoff (3x), pin+verify a checksum, prefer Actions cache / vendored binary.

CARRIED: Avenger absent 4+ consecutive windows; --max-turns 25 issue still unverified. Keep the 'set max-turns: ~50 in .github/workflows/avenger.md' recommendation open; re-evaluate when Avenger next runs.
